name: Macaroni & Cheese - Old-Fashioned - Jds
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Shredded Cheddar Cheese, divided (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni in boiling salted water until "al dente." Approximately 5-6 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, melt butter in a small saucepan. Stir in flour, salt, mustard, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Cook and stir until smooth.
3. Drain the macaroni; combine with butter mixture in a large bowl and mix well.
4. Stir in milk and 2 1/2 cups of cheese.
5. Pour into an ungreased 2 1/2 quart baking dish. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
6. Sprinkle with remaining cheese; let stand 5 minutes before serving.
